title: Argentinian Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry recipe from Argentina. This dish is quick to make and packed with protein and vegetables.
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Argentinian sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the stir-fry vegetables and cook until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Push the vegetables to one side of the skillet.
Crack the boiled egg into the other side of the skillet and scramble it.
Mix the egg with the vegetables.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
